issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in the skill instructions.

scenarios.name: Create a validated user signup dialog using shadcn/ui
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented Form + FormField + zodResolver pattern with shadcn add commands and components/ui imports; baseline writes a generic React form without the shadcn copy-paste pattern.

scenarios.name: Add a Cmd+K command palette to a Next.js app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented CommandDialog/CommandInput/CommandList components installed via shadcn add and the keydown listener pattern; baseline likely hand-rolls a modal or uses cmdk directly without the shadcn wrapper.
